name: AVANOS MEDICAL, INC.
business: Avanos Medical, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on delivering clinically superior medical device solutions that help patients get back to the things that matter, with segments Specialty Nutrition Systems (enteral feeding, neonate solutions) and Pain Management and Recovery (surgical pain pumps, radiofrequency ablation).

exposures.sentence: Avanos Medical, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on delivering clinically superior medical device solutions that help patients get back to the things that matter.

catalysts.event: Plan expansion expected to run through 2026
catalysts.sentence: The initiatives associated with the expansion of the Plan are expected to run through 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to start working with enterprise Claude Code and develop AI Agents in 2026
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we plan to start working with enterprise Claude Code for non-proprietary coding work and to develop AI Agents in our secure enterprise ChatGPT environment for conducting data analysis.

catalysts.event: Final determination on Medicare coverage for peripheral RFA expected in early 2026
catalysts.sentence: A final determination on this issue is expected to be made in early 2026.
